scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ghost/types run build && pnpm --filter @ghost/protocol run build && pnpm --filter @ghost/desktop run build && rm -rf apps/server/public/assets && cp -r apps/desktop/dist/assets apps/server/public/assets && cp apps/desktop/dist/index.html apps/server/public/index.html
scripts.start: pnpm run build && cd apps/server && npx tsx src/index.ts
